description_long: This is a rectangular, amber-colored glass bottle with a black screw cap and a prominent, ornate black-and-white label on the front reading 'Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey.' The bottle has a classic, squared-off shoulder and base, with slightly beveled edges and a tall neck. The front label features intricate white typography and decorative flourishes, while the back and side labels provide additional product information and branding. The cap is matte black and cylindrical, fitting snugly over the neck. The glass is transparent, allowing the amber liquid inside to be visible. The overall appearance is iconic and easily recognizable, often associated with whiskey bottles found in urban bars, restaurants, or discarded in public spaces.
description: A rectangular, amber glass whiskey bottle with a black screw cap and ornate black-and-white Jack Daniel's branding. The transparent glass reveals the amber liquid inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate Jack Daniel's label with white text and decorative elements on a black background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a vertical black label with white text listing product details and branding.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a smaller label with product information and a barcode, with the amber glass and liquid visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a wide black label featuring white text and symbols, including recycling information.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front: Large black-and-white 'Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey' label with ornate white typography and decorative flourishes. Sides and back: Black labels with white text, including product details, branding, and a barcode. All labels are rectangular and prominently placed.
